heading: Midshipman status in the Navy Reserve
label: 51511 Midshipman status in the Navy Reserve
text: A citizen of the United States attending a State maritime academy may be appointed by the Secretary of the Navy as a midshipman in the Navy Reserve (including the Merchant Marine Reserve, Navy Reserve).
